signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine Easter ceasefire collapses after 32 hours amid mutual violation accusations
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine Easter ceasefire collapses after 32 hours amid mutual violation accusations.** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[1][2][3][4]

signals.headline: TRUMP-IRAN CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED: VIX TUMBLES AS MARKETS RALLY** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[3]
signals.raw:
TRUMP-IRAN CEASEFIRE CONFIRMED: VIX TUMBLES AS MARKETS RALLY** | **YES** | **HIGH** confidence[3]

President Trump agreed to a temporary ceasefire in the war against Iran, following his earlier threat of civilizational obliteration unless a deal was struck by nightfall, causing the VIX to drop 5.6 points to 20.18—its lowest since pre-war levels—and sparking a market rally[3].
